signatureMove.name: Cut Purse
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If this character was not slain then it may take possession of up to one Moonstone carried by the enemy.

abilities.name: Weakling
abilities.description: Reduce all Melee Dmg this character deals by -1. Harvest actions cost this model +1 energy.

abilities.name: Concealed Dagger
abilities.description: If this character deals Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1. If this character plays a Rising Attack increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

abilities.name: Look of Innocence
abilities.description: When an enemy targets this character with an action, the active enemy model must discard 1 energy or the action is cancelled.

abilities.name: Disappear in a Crowd
abilities.description: This character's Evade Stat is -[#], where [#] is the number of other models within 3", excluding the originator of the ability.

abilities.name: Swift
abilities.description: When making a Reaction Step while engaged by an enemy, this model may move 2" instead of the usual 1".

arcaneOutcomes.text: This character loses the Look of Innocence and Disappear in a Crowd abilities and is Evade Stat +1 until end of turn.
